info.title: BasicDiet145 Dashboard API
info.description: Production Dashboard/Admin API documentation for BasicDiet145. Scope is dashboard/admin routes only: /api/dashboard/*, /api/dashboard/auth/*, /api/dashboard/ops/*, and the dashboard-used catalog management routes under /api/admin/meal-planner-menu/*. Mobile/public APIs are intentionally excluded except short related-flow notes in Markdown.

post.description: Issues a dashboard JWT. This token is separate from mobile app tokens and must be sent as Authorization: Bearer {{dashboardToken}}.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Response language where localized fields are serialized.

403.description: Role is not allowed to call this endpoint

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Response language where localized fields are serialized.

post.description: Stateless JWT logout no-op. Clients should discard the dashboard token.
